headline: PepsiCo (PEP): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: PepsiCo’s 13.3% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 7.7%, and its stock price has climbed to $160.59 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Jobs Crash, War Flares: Smart Money Hides In These Stocks
summary: Investors are rotating into classic defensive stocks like healthcare, energy majors, consumer staples giants and even cash‑rich AI leaders.

headline: The NASDAQ Dividend Stocks Retirees Are Loading Up On Before the Next Rate Cut
summary: U.S. Treasury bonds paid decent yields for a while, but that’s very likely to come to an end soon. This year and in 2027, retirees should prepare their portfolios for one or more interest-rate cuts. If government bond yields are poised to fall, retirement investors will probably want to get passive income from other sources. ... The NASDAQ Dividend Stocks Retirees Are Loading Up On Before the Next Rate Cut

headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
summary: Economist Heather Long says the U.S. economy is diverging into three tiers of consumer behavior instead of two, amid an ongoing affordability crisis.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks with Open Questions
summary: Wall Street’s bearish price targets for the stocks in this article signal serious concerns. Such forecasts are uncommon in an industry where maintaining cordial corporate relationships often trumps delivering the hard truth.

summary: The snacking giant is positioning its portfolio to meet demand for functional ingredients, while Nate’s Honey sweetens nut butters and fruit spreads.

headline: PepsiCo Leans On Health Drinks And Pop Culture As Shares Lag Targets
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) rolls out Gatorade Lower Sugar nationwide in the US, featuring reduced sugar and no artificial ingredients. The company expands its poppi better for you soda brand into the UK market. bubly launches limited edition Super Mario Galaxy Movie themed flavors and collectibles tied to a blockbuster release. For you as an investor, these moves show how PepsiCo is leaning into health focused beverages while still relying on entertainment and pop culture to keep its brands in...
